name: Taffy Apple Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Remove 1/4 cup of cookie dough and reserve for another use.
3. Roll the reserved dough into a 14-inch circle on the pizza pan.
4. Bake for 10-15 minutes or until the cookie is lightly browned. Let cool for 10 minutes, then loosen the cookie from the pan. Cool completely.
5. Blend peanut butter, cream cheese, brown sugar, and vanilla together until smooth.
6. Spread the mixture evenly on the cooled cookie.
7. Peel, core, and slice the apples.
8. Dip apple slices in lemon-lime soda to prevent browning.
9. Arrange apple slices on top of the cream cheese mixture.
10. Sprinkle lightly with cinnamon.
11. Heat caramel topping slightly and drizzle over the apples.
12. Sprinkle chopped nuts over the pizza.
13. Cut into pieces and serve.
